findings.message:
Reentrancy in FinancialPoolManager._selectWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#213-270):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = winner.call{value: p.goodValue}() (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#264)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- p.status = finished (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#268)
	FinancialPoolManager.pools (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#46) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FinancialPoolManager._selectWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#213-270)
	- FinancialPoolManager.activatePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#93-111)
	- FinancialPoolManager.createPool(string,uint256,uint256,uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#68-90)
	- FinancialPoolManager.deletePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#114-127)
	- FinancialPoolManager.getPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#277-307)
	- FinancialPoolManager.leavePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#149-169)
	- FinancialPoolManager.onlyOwner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#58-61)
	- FinancialPoolManager.participateInPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#134-146)
	- FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#176-207)
findings.name: reentrancy-eth

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#176-207) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- info.payments == duePayments && ! info.received (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#198)
findings.name: incorrect-equality

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager._selectWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#213-270) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- counter == rand (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#247)
findings.name: incorrect-equality

findings.message: FinancialPoolManager._selectWinner(uint256).counter (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#241) is a local variable never initialized
findings.name: uninitialized-local

findings.message: FinancialPoolManager._selectWinner(uint256).index (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#240) is a local variable never initialized
findings.name: uninitialized-local

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#176-207) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(p.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(active)),Pool not active) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#182-185)
	- require(bool,string)(p.isParticipant[msg.sender],Not a participant) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#186)
	- require(bool,string)(msg.value == p.installmentValue,Incorrect installment value) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#187)
	- require(bool,string)(info.payments < duePayments,No payment due) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#193)
	- info.payments == duePayments && ! info.received (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#198)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:

	Dangerous comparisons:

	- require(bool,string)(p.isParticipant[msg.sender],Not a participant) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#156)
findings.name: timestamp

FinancialPoolManager.participateInPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#134-146) uses timestamp for comparisons

	- require(bool,string)(! p.isParticipant[msg.sender],Already participating) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#141)

findings.message:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#8)
findings.name: solc-version
